registers.name: CM55CR
registers.description: SYSCFG Cortex-M55 control register.
registers.fieldset_description: SYSCFG Cortex-M55 control register.

fields.name: FPU_IT_EN
fields.description: Enable FPU exception.

fields.name: LOCKSVTAIRCR
fields.description: Prevent changes to:.

fields.name: LOCKNSVTOR
fields.description: Prevent changes to the non-secure vector table base address.

fields.name: LOCKSMPU
fields.description: Prevent changes to programmed secure MPU memory regions.

fields.name: LOCKNSMPU
fields.description: Prevent changes to non-secure MPU memory regions already programmed.

fields.name: LOCKSAU
fields.description: Prevent changes to secure SAU memory regions already programmed.

fields.name: LOCKDCAIC
fields.description: Disable access to the instruction cache direct cache access registers DCAICLR and DCAICRR.

registers.name: CM55TCMCR

registers.fieldset_description: SYSCFG Cortex-M55 TCM control register.

fields.name: CFGITCMSZ
fields.description: Select ITCM memory size.

fields.name: CFGDTCMSZ
fields.description: Select DTCM memory size.

fields.name: LOCKTCM
fields.description: Disable writes to registers associated with the TCM region.

fields.name: LOCKITGU
fields.description: Disable writes to registers associated with the ITCM interface security gating.

fields.name: LOCKDTGU
fields.description: Disable writes to registers associated with the DTCM interface security gating.

fields.name: ITCMWSDISABLE
fields.description: Disable wait-state applied by default on extended ITCM memory.

fields.name: DTCMWSDISABLE
fields.description: Disable wait-state applied by default on extended DTCM memory.

fields.name: RME_TCM
fields.description: RW margin enable input for TCM memories.

fields.name: RM_TCM
fields.description: External RW margin inputs for TCM memories.

fields.name: BC1_TCM
fields.description: Biasing level adjust input recommended for Vnom.

fields.name: BC2_TCM
fields.description: Biasing level adjust input recommended for Vnom + 10%.

fields.name: RME_CACHE
fields.description: RW margin enable input for caches memories.

fields.name: RM_CACHE
fields.description: External read/write (RW) margin inputs for caches memories.

fields.name: BC1_CACHE
fields.description: Biasing level adjust input recommended for Vnom.

fields.name: BC2_CACHE
fields.description: Biasing level adjust input recommended for Vnom + 10%.

registers.name: VDDIO1CCCR
registers.description: SYSCFG VDDIO1 compensation cell control register.
registers.fieldset_description: SYSCFG VDDIO1 compensation cell control register.

fields.name: RANSRC
fields.description: These bits are written by software to define an I/O compensation code for NMOS transistors. This code is applied to the I/O compensation cell when the CS = 1.

fields.name: RAPSRC
fields.description: These bits are written by software to define an I/O compensation code for PMOS transistors. This code is applied to the I/O compensation cell when CS = 1.

fields.name: EN
fields.description: Enables the compensation cell of I/Os supplied by VDDIOx.

fields.name: CS
fields.description: Selects the code to be applied for the compensation cell of I/Os supplied by VDDIOx.

registers.name: VDDIO1CCSR
registers.description: SYSCFG VDDIO1 compensation cell status register.
registers.fieldset_description: SYSCFG VDDIO1 compensation cell status register.

fields.name: ANSRC
fields.description: This value is provided by the cell, and can be used by the CPU to compute an I/O compensation cell code for NMOS transistors.

fields.name: APSRC
fields.description: This value is provided by the cell, and can be used by the CPU to compute an I/O compensation cell code for PMOS transistors.

fields.name: READY
fields.description: Provides the compensation cell status of I/Os supplied by VDDIOx.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Backup SRAM double ECC error signal disconnected from TIM1/8/15/16/17 break inputs.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Backup SRAM double ECC error signal connected to TIM1/8/15/16/17 break inputs.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: BOOT0 pin connected to VSS (or left open if BOOT0_PD = 0).

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: BOOT0 pin connected to VDD.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Pull-down enabled. The BOOT0 pin can be left open and takes a value of 0 if open.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Pull-down disabled. The BOOT0 pin must not be left open.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: BOOT1 pin connected to VSS (or left open if BOOT1_PD = 0 in BOOTCR).

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: BOOT1 pin connected to VDD.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Pull-down enabled. The BOOT1 pin can be left open and takes a value of 0 if open.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Pull-down disabled. The BOOT1 pin must not be left open.

variants.name: B_0x8
variants.description: 128 Kbytes (default value).

variants.name: B_0x9
variants.description: 256 Kbytes.

variants.name: B_0x7
variants.description: 64 KB (default value).

variants.name: B_0x8
variants.description: 128 Kbytes.

variants.name: B_0x9
variants.description: 256 Kbytes.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: No retiming on Rx path.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Retiming on Rx path.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: No retiming on Tx path.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Retiming on Tx path.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Cortex-M55 cache double ECC error signal disconnected from TIM1/8/15/16/17 break inputs.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Cortex-M55 cache double ECC error signal connected to TIM1/8/15/16/17 break inputs.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Cortex-M55 lockup output disconnected from TIM1/8/15/16/17 break inputs.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Cortex-M55 lockup output disconnected from TIM1/8/15/16/17 break inputs.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Cortex-M55 TCM double ECC error signal disconnected from TIM1/8/15/16/17 break inputs.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Cortex-M55 TCM double ECC error signal connected to TIM1/8/15/16/17 break inputs.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Warm reset (default value).

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Power-on reset.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Interleaving disabled.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Interleaving enabled.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: High-speed mode disabled, or use ADC ANA pin.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: High-speed mode enabled, or connect internal ADC ANA signal to GPIO.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Lockup state must be recovered from NVIC interrupt (default value).

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Lockup generates a NMI on the core.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Lockup state shall be recovered from interrupt (default value).

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Lockup requests a warm reset to the RCC.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Error capture.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Clean error.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: PKA, SAES, CRYP1/2, and HASH reset in case of potential tamper.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: PKA, SAES, CRYP1/2, and HASH not reset in case of potential tamper.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: PVD interrupt disconnected from TIM1/8/15/16/17 break input. PVDE bits can be programmed by the application.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: PVD interrupt connected to TIM1/8/15/16/17 break input. PVDE and bits are read only.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Default RW margin settings.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Use external pin RW margin setting.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Default RW margin settings.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Use external pin RW margin setting.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: No delay on the feedback clock.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Half a cycle delay on the feedback clock.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Early-write response disabled. The last AHB write data beat receives the AXI buffered response for the complete AHB transaction.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Early-write response enabled. AHB-Lite write data beats receive an automatic OK response from the AHB-to-AXI bridge, whatever the B-channel AXI response.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Early-write response disabled. The last AHB write data beat receives the AXI buffered response for the complete AHB transaction.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Early-write response enabled. AHB-Lite write data beats receive an automatic OK response from the AHB-to-AXI bridge, whatever the B-channel AXI response.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Standard run mode (no HDP).

variants.name: B_0xC
variants.description: Analyze fsm mode analysis.

variants.name: B_0xD
variants.description: Analyze fsm mos analysis.

variants.name: B_0xE
variants.description: Analyze fsm rampe analysis.

variants.name: B_0xF
variants.description: Analyze fsm mode analysis.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Early-write response enabled. AHB-Lite write data beats receive an automatic OK response from the AHB-to-AXI bridge, whatever the B-channel AXI response.
